_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: we quantitated the relative fluorescence intensity, and detected a 50% increase in NG2 staining in the Nf1 GFAP CKO mouse optic nerves relative to the control mouse optic nerves
details: 50% increase in NG2 staining in optic nerves compared to control mice
